source_path: HOA_govern_doc_samples/CC&R/NEWPHR Maintenance Association - CC&Rs with Articles and Bylaws.pdf

pets.restrictions: Not found in pages reviewed via OCR. Document is 111 pages; pet policy likely in Use Restrictions article not yet sampled.

rentals.restrictions: Declaration explicitly does not limit Declarant's right to market, sell, lease, or dispose of parcels. Owner rental rights not explicitly restricted in pages reviewed.

dues.notes: Multi-component cost center assessment structure (Article 5). Regular Assessments + Cost Center Assessment Components assessed separately. Special Assessments available for extraordinary expenses (Section 5.4). Delinquent assessments accrue additional charges, lien rights under CA Civil Code §1367.

parking.restrictions: Not found in pages reviewed via OCR.

architectural_control: Architectural committee referenced. Specific review process not captured in pages reviewed via OCR.
amendment_vote_threshold: 67% of Voting Power of the Maintenance Association (Article 14, Section 14.1). Certain articles (e.g. Article 4) require Declarant's prior written consent to amend.
board_size: 5 directors representing different Areas. Upon expiration of Class C (Declarant) membership, representatives shift to Class A/B members.
notes: Fully scanned PDF — no embedded text layer. Extracted via targeted OCR (poppler pdftoppm + tesseract) on sampled pages. This is a larger mixed-use master association with multiple sub-areas ('Sierra Highlands', 'Hotel Property', 'Urban Amenity Area'), suggesting a master/sub-association structure. Recorded by Chicago Title Company. Attorney: Luce, Forward, Hamilton & Scripps LLP. Several fields require full-document OCR for completion.
